title: Harness Engineering Is AI’s New Gold Rush
summary: Harness engineering represents a shift beyond prompt engineering toward building comprehensive systems around AI models. It encompasses tools, memory management, context layers, permissions, verification mechanisms, recovery paths, and feedback loops to make AI agents reliable and functional in production environments.
